name: caddy
description: Fast and extensible multi-platform HTTP/1-2-3 web server with automatic HTTPS
nfpm_config: {"description":"Fast and extensible multi-platform HTTP/1-2-3 web server with automatic HTTPS","contents":[{"src":"{{binary}}","dst":"/usr/bin/caddy","mode":"0755"},{"src":"{{systemd_service}}","dst":"/usr/lib/systemd/system/caddy.service"},{"src":"{{default_config}}","dst":"/etc/caddy/Caddyfile","type":"config|noreplace"},{"dst":"/var/lib/caddy","type":"dir"},{"dst":"/var/lib/caddy/.config","type":"dir"},{"dst":"/var/lib/caddy/.config/caddy","type":"dir"},{"dst":"/var/lib/caddy/.local","type":"dir"},{"dst":"/var/lib/caddy/.local/share","type":"dir"},{"dst":"/var/lib/caddy/.local/share/caddy","type":"dir"}],"depends":["shadow-utils"],"rpm_group":"System Environment/Daemons"}
script_postinstall:
#!/bin/bash
# Create caddy group and user if not exists
getent group caddy >/dev/null || groupadd --system caddy
getent passwd caddy >/dev/null || useradd --system \
    --gid caddy \
    --create-home \
    --home-dir /var/lib/caddy \
    --shell /usr/sbin/nologin \
    --comment "Caddy web server" caddy

# Ensure directory ownership
mkdir -p /etc/caddy
mkdir -p /var/lib/caddy/.config/caddy
mkdir -p /var/lib/caddy/.local/share/caddy
chown -R caddy:caddy /var/lib/caddy

# Reload systemd and enable service
systemctl daemon-reload
systemctl enable caddy.service 2>/dev/null || true

# If this is an upgrade and the service was running, restart it
if systemctl is-active --quiet caddy.service 2>/dev/null; then
    systemctl restart caddy.service
fi
script_preremove:
#!/bin/bash
# Only run on uninstall (not upgrade)
if [ "$1" = "0" ] || [ "$1" = "remove" ]; then
    if systemctl is-active --quiet caddy.service 2>/dev/null; then
        systemctl stop caddy.service
    fi
    systemctl disable caddy.service 2>/dev/null || true
fi
systemd_service:
[Unit]
Description=Caddy
Documentation=https://caddyserver.com/docs/
After=network.target network-online.target
Requires=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=notify
User=caddy
Group=caddy
ExecStart=/usr/bin/caddy run --environ --config /etc/caddy/Caddyfile
ExecReload=/usr/bin/caddy reload --config /etc/caddy/Caddyfile --force
TimeoutStopSec=5s
LimitNOFILE=1048576
LimitNPROC=512
PrivateTmp=true
ProtectSystem=full
AmbientCapabilities=CAP_NET_BIND_SERVICE
ReadWritePaths=/var/lib/caddy/.local/share/caddy
ReadWritePaths=/var/lib/caddy/.config/caddy

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
default_config:
# Caddyfile
# https://caddyserver.com/docs/caddyfile
#
# The Caddyfile is an easy way to configure your Caddy web server.
#
# Unless the file starts with a global options block, the first
# uncommented line is always the address of your site.

:80 {
	respond "Hello, world!"
}
